text: Can you hear me? Hey, glad to hear you. I'm James from Nova Health Care, North Carolina. I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that may help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital stay. So to check whether you are eligible for this, may I know your age please? Forty-one. Sorry, you don't seem to qualify for the benefit of the plans I have. Have a good day.
